docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLAUET, TIPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BADEL, DAVY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY CLAUET, TIPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT BADEL, DAVY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BADEL, DAVY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
